c.d: The number of active users on the app, reflecting popularity and social reach.
The specific demographic group or interest group the app is tailored for (e.g., women, young people, language learners).
Primary method of connecting users such as events, chatting, shared interests, or gaming.
Whether the app encourages or facilitates real-life meetups and offline connections.
Special features such as live photo sharing, horoscope-based conversations, or group creation.
c.s: Science of People, Medicinal Media, Howbout

c.d: Measures and design that protect user privacy and control over shared content.
